reviews.review_msg: Excellent prof. Pay attention, do the readings, don't be lazy, and the assignments actually get interesting. It is obvious that Jonathon has high interest in what he teaches, which is what makes the lectures interesting.
great teacher; i hate poetry. the students in this class think that poetry means easy reading and get upset when they realize that they actually have to work.

Okay, this guy is not a prof, he's a fan. Obviously he is really into poetry (which kind of makes the class have interest) but the things he goes into detail about are THE MOST IRRELEVANT. Any knowledge I had about the poems was from the tutorial instructor (great guy). The class was not worth it & should have been called Poetry&Internet Relations.
